title: Brigitte Macron Lie: Anatomy of a Disinformation Campaign
description: A baseless conspiracy theory alleging French First Lady Brigitte Macron is transgender continues to spread. This article dissects the lie's mechanics, its financial beneficiaries, and its weaponization in global far-right networks — and why a 2023 libel conviction hasn't stopped any of it.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The Anatomy of a Lie: The Brigitte Macron Disinformation Campaign
